// src/repositories/UserRepository.js
import UserDAO from'../dao/UserDAO';const UserRepository={async getAll(){return await UserDAO.findAll();},async getById(id){return await UserDAO.findById(id);},async findByIdMaybe(id){return await UserDAO.findByIdMaybe(id);},async create(data){return await UserDAO.create(data);},async update(id,data){return await UserDAO.update(id,data);},async remove(id){return await UserDAO.delete(id);},async getByEmail(email){return await UserDAO.findByEmail(email);},async findUsersRowMaybe(id){return await UserDAO.findUsersRowMaybe(id);}};export default UserRepository;
